name: Security Rubric
description: Evaluates fix quality against common security best practices (OWASP-aligned)

criteria.name: Input Sanitization
criteria.description: Fix sanitizes or validates untrusted input before use

criteria.name: Injection Guard
criteria.description: Fix prevents injection vectors (SQL, command, path traversal)

criteria.name: Secure Defaults
criteria.description: Fix applies principle of least privilege and safe fallback defaults
